name: Jessie - Crashing at yours
description:
You let your kinda homeless friend crash at your place.

🚬

Well, it’s been a minute—about two months since my last bot (which you won’t find, since I ended up disliking all my old ones and made them private). Maybe I’ll redo them someday, maybe not.

I’ve been a fan of Veyonis’ characters since around January, and after some thought, I decided to start making bots of them myself. Honestly, I would’ve done this sooner if it weren’t for my fear of mischaracterization.

Big thanks to creators like @EminemsSalsa, @airilol, and @Cyektor. They’re the goats. Even bigger thanks to the Veyonis fan server on Discord—the people there are great, and their info was super helpful for making this bot.

Anyway, if there’s a specific one of the girls you’d like to see next, put it in the comments.

And enjoy too.
